import React from 'react' import './nav.css' import {AiOutlineHome} from 'react-icons/ai' import {AiOutlineUser} from 'react-icons/ai' import {BiBook} from 'react-icons/bi' import {RiServiceLine} from 'react-icons/ri' import {TbMessage} from 'react-icons/tb' import {useState} from 'react' const Nav = () => { const [ activeNav , setActiveNav] = useState('#') return (
setActiveNav('#') } className={activeNav === '#' ? 'active':''}> setActiveNav('#about')} className={activeNav === '#about' ? 'active' : ''}> setActiveNav('#experience')} className={activeNav === '#experience' ? 'active' : ''}> setActiveNav('#services')} className={activeNav === '#services' ? 'active' : ''}> setActiveNav('#contact')} className={activeNav === '#contact' ? 'active' : ''}>
) } export default Nav
